{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Account Officer",
  "description": "Erisco Foods Limited is an indigenous food product manufacturer, incorporated in Nigeria in 2004 and started operations in 2009, manufacturing Tomato Paste, Seasoning, Rice, Milk cubes and more. We are firmly committed to producing high-quality products that combine nourishment with value pricing, as they strive to become one of Nigeria&rsquo;s largest indigenous foodmanufacturers on a global scale.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Iju Ishaga, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and organized Account Officerto join our finance team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing financial records, processing transactions, reconciling accounts, and ensuring compliance with company policies and accounting standards.


Responsibilities


	Maintain accurate financial records and ledgers
	Prepare and review financial documents, reports, and statements
	Process invoices, receipts, and payments promptly
	Reconcile bank statements and resolve discrepancies
	Support the preparation of monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports
	Assist in budget preparation and financial forecasting
	Ensure compliance with tax regulations and company financial policies
	Collaborate with internal departments to ensure smooth financial operations.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field with&nbsp;inimum of 2 years of accounting experience
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, Sage)
	Strong attention to detail and numerical accuracy
	Good organizational and time-management skills
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Professional certification (e.g., ICAN, ACCA) is an added advantage.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@eriscofoodsltd.com.ng&nbsp;using &quot;Account Officer&quot; as the subject of the mail.

Note:&nbsp;Only qualified candidates will be contacted.",

Account Officer Job at Erisco Foods Limited




        
    

        
        Erisco Foods Limited is an indigenous food product manufacturer, incorporated in Nigeria in 2004 and started operations in 2009, manufacturing Tomato Paste, Seasoning, Rice, Milk cubes and more. We are firmly committed to producing high-quality products that combine nourishment with value pricing, as they strive to become one of Nigeria’s largest indigenous foodmanufacturers on a global scale.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Officer

Job Location: Iju Ishaga, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a detail-oriented and organized Account Officerto join our finance team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing financial records, processing transactions, reconciling accounts, and ensuring compliance with company policies and accounting standards.


Responsibilities


	Maintain accurate financial records and ledgers
	Prepare and review financial documents, reports, and statements
	Process invoices, receipts, and payments promptly
	Reconcile bank statements and resolve discrepancies
	Support the preparation of monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports
	Assist in budget preparation and financial forecasting
	Ensure compliance with tax regulations and company financial policies
	Collaborate with internal departments to ensure smooth financial operations.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field with inimum of 2 years of accounting experience
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, Sage)
	Strong attention to detail and numerical accuracy
	Good organizational and time-management skills
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Professional certification (e.g., ICAN, ACCA) is an added advantage.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Account Officer" as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only qualified candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

Job Location:&nbsp;Idi ishi, Jericho. Ibadan - Oyo

Personal Assistant Job at LEAM Consulting Limited




        
    

        
        LEAM Consulting Limited is the foremost consulting firm that stands out in areas of professional certification training, HR advisory services, Business Development / Startup, and IT consulting services in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Personal Assistant

Job Location: Idi ishi, Jericho. Ibadan - Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	As a key member of our team, you'll provide administrative support, manage schedules, and handle various tasks requiring discretion and professionalism.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Manage executive's schedule and calendar.
	Draft letters, emails, and documents.
	Handle travel arrangements and logistics.
	Assist in social media presence and creating content.


Requirements


	Minimum of SSCEAmbitious and willing to learn and grow.


Resourceful and proactive.


	Excellent communication and writing skills.
	Willingness to travel frequently
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment.


Method of Application 
Interested & qualified candidate should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more enquiries, send a Whatsapp message to 09047710414.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Fleet Cost Accountant",
  "description": "Ascentech Services Limited is a full-fledged Human Resource Solution Provider incorporated in 2013 with its Head Office in Lagos, Nigeria. We are committed to forging long-term partnerships with our clients by creating and delivering robust and flexible services that address the changing needs of their business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Poition: Fleet Cost Accountant

Job Location:&nbsp;Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a detail-oriented Fleet Cost Accountant to manage and analyze costs associated with fleet operations. The ideal candidate will ensure accurate cost tracking, reporting, and optimization to support business efficiency.


Key Responsibilities


	Monitor and analyze fleet-related expenses (fuel, maintenance, repairs, etc.)
	Prepare cost reports and provide insights for cost control
	Track vehicle utilization and operational efficiency
	Reconcile fleet accounts and ensure accurate financial records
	Support budgeting and forecasting for fleet operations
	Identify cost-saving opportunities and process improvements.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field with&nbsp;3&ndash;5 years&rsquo; experience in cost accounting (fleet/logistics experience is an advantage)
	Strong analytical and reporting skills
	Proficiency in Excel and accounting software
	Attention to detail and strong organizational skills.


Salary
Up to N400,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;cv@ascentech.com.ng&nbsp;using&nbsp;&ldquo;Fleet Cost Accountant &ndash; Port Harcourt&rdquo; as the subject of the email.",

Fleet Cost Accountant Job at Ascentech Services Limited




        
    

        
        Ascentech Services Limited is a full-fledged Human Resource Solution Provider incorporated in 2013 with its Head Office in Lagos, Nigeria. We are committed to forging long-term partnerships with our clients by creating and delivering robust and flexible services that address the changing needs of their business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Poition: Fleet Cost Accountant

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a detail-oriented Fleet Cost Accountant to manage and analyze costs associated with fleet operations. The ideal candidate will ensure accurate cost tracking, reporting, and optimization to support business efficiency.


Key Responsibilities


	Monitor and analyze fleet-related expenses (fuel, maintenance, repairs, etc.)
	Prepare cost reports and provide insights for cost control
	Track vehicle utilization and operational efficiency
	Reconcile fleet accounts and ensure accurate financial records
	Support budgeting and forecasting for fleet operations
	Identify cost-saving opportunities and process improvements.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field with 3–5 years’ experience in cost accounting (fleet/logistics experience is an advantage)
	Strong analytical and reporting skills
	Proficiency in Excel and accounting software
	Attention to detail and strong organizational skills.


Salary
Up to N400,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Fleet Cost Accountant – Port Harcourt” as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Front-End Web Developer",
  "description": "Stretch-it Concepts - We are a human resource outsourcing solutions company, bureau of recruitment, performance management and training and development company situated in Lagos, Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front-End Web Developer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Slot: 2

Job&nbsp;Summary


	We are hiring a Front-End Web Developer for a growing IT company in Lagos.
	You will be responsible for creating engaging websites and web applications that deliver excellent user experience across desktop and mobile devices.


Key&nbsp;Responsibilities


	Build responsive websites and web interfaces from UI/UX designs
	Develop using HTML, CSS, JavaScript and modern frameworks
	Convert Figma / Adobe XD designs into functional web pages
	Optimize websites for speed and performance
	Ensure cross-browser and mobile compatibility
	Collaborate with backend developers and designers
	Maintain and improve existing websites
	Troubleshoot front-end bugs and UI issues
	Implement SEO-friendly and accessible designs


What&nbsp;We&nbsp;Are&nbsp;Looking&nbsp;For


	B.Sc / HND / OND in relevant field (or strong portfolio)
	3&ndash;4 years of front-end development experience
	Strong skills in HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript
	Experience with React, Vue, or similar frameworks is an advantage
	Good eye for design and detail
	Understanding of responsive design principles
	Portfolio of previous projects is a plus


Why&nbsp;You&nbsp;Should&nbsp;Apply


	Very Competitive
	Work on exciting websites and digital products
	Grow your skills in a creative tech environment
	Opportunity to build real products used by clients
	Career advancement opportunities
	Supportive and innovative team culture.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send send their CV to:&nbsp;jobs@stretchitconcepts.com&nbsp;using&nbsp;&quot;Front-End Web Developer&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

Front-End Web Developer Job at Stretch-it Concepts




        
    

        
        Stretch-it Concepts - We are a human resource outsourcing solutions company, bureau of recruitment, performance management and training and development company situated in Lagos, Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front-End Web Developer

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Slot: 2

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are hiring a Front-End Web Developer for a growing IT company in Lagos.
	You will be responsible for creating engaging websites and web applications that deliver excellent user experience across desktop and mobile devices.


Key Responsibilities


	Build responsive websites and web interfaces from UI/UX designs
	Develop using HTML, CSS, JavaScript and modern frameworks
	Convert Figma / Adobe XD designs into functional web pages
	Optimize websites for speed and performance
	Ensure cross-browser and mobile compatibility
	Collaborate with backend developers and designers
	Maintain and improve existing websites
	Troubleshoot front-end bugs and UI issues
	Implement SEO-friendly and accessible designs


What We Are Looking For


	B.Sc / HND / OND in relevant field (or strong portfolio)
	3–4 years of front-end development experience
	Strong skills in HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript
	Experience with React, Vue, or similar frameworks is an advantage
	Good eye for design and detail
	Understanding of responsive design principles
	Portfolio of previous projects is a plus


Why You Should Apply


	Very Competitive
	Work on exciting websites and digital products
	Grow your skills in a creative tech environment
	Opportunity to build real products used by clients
	Career advancement opportunities
	Supportive and innovative team culture.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send send their CV to: [email protected] using "Front-End Web Developer" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
